title: Pipeline STALLED at coordinator forwarding — 0 execution requests in 60s smoke test
evidence: Baseline: execution-requests=1, execution-results=0. After 60s: execution-requests=1 (no change), execution-results=0 (no change). Coordinator consumed 44→33 pending on opportunities (actively processing) but forwarded 0 to execution. Execution engine reports opportunitiesReceived:0, executionAttempts:0.
expected: Coordinator should forward at least some opportunities to execution-requests in 60s
actual: 0 opportunities forwarded — pipeline stalled at coordinator validation/forwarding stage
recommendation: Investigate coordinator forwarding criteria in simulation mode. Check if simulated opportunity profit/gas/expiry values pass coordinator validation thresholds. Add coordinator forwarding rejection counters to /metrics for visibility. Possible causes: (1) opportunities expiring before coordinator processes them, (2) profit thresholds too strict for simulated data, (3) execution circuit breaker at coordinator level blocking forwards.

title: Opportunities stream at MAXLEN cap — older messages being trimmed
evidence: Stream hovering at 10000-10003 (MAXLEN=10000 with approximate trimming). Partitions published 34K+ total opportunities in 400s uptime but stream stays at cap.
expected: Stream below MAXLEN with consumer keeping up
actual: At cap — producers overwhelming the stream. Unread messages may be lost to trimming.
recommendation: Increase MAXLEN from 10000 to 50000 for stream:opportunities, or increase coordinator consume batch size. Add alerting when stream reaches 80% MAXLEN.

title: All 14 active chains detecting — per-chain breakdown
evidence: P1: BSC(3093), Polygon(2166), Avalanche(2181), Fantom(1522). P2: Arbitrum(5324), Optimism(2443), Base(4222), Scroll(2478), Blast(2456). P3: Ethereum(3386), zkSync(2563), Linea(2517). P4: Solana(240). All chains active.
actual: 14/14 active chains producing events and opportunities

title: Solana pairsMonitored=0 despite 49K events — pair tracking may not apply to Solana
evidence: P4 stats: eventsProcessed=49140, opportunitiesFound=240, pairsMonitored=0. High event/opportunity ratio suggests Solana uses different detection pattern.
actual: 0 pairs monitored but 240 opportunities found — detection working via different mechanism
recommendation: Verify Solana pair monitoring is intentionally different. If pairsMonitored should be populated, investigate.

title: Risk state stable at NORMAL throughout smoke test
evidence: Pre-smoke: riskState=NORMAL, positionSizeMultiplier=1. Post-smoke: identical — no state change during test.

title: DLQ stable at 0 — no message failures during smoke test
evidence: Baseline DLQ=0, forwarding-dlq=0. Final: DLQ=0, forwarding-dlq=0.

title: P2 chain assignment differs from monitoring doc — zkSync and Linea are in P3 not P2
evidence: Monitoring doc says P2 has 'Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, zkSync, Linea, Blast, Scroll, Mantle, Mode'. Actual P2 chains: [arbitrum, optimism, base, scroll, blast] (5 chains). zkSync and Linea are in P3 (ethereum, zksync, linea). Mantle and Mode are stubs (not in any partition).
actual: P2 has 5 chains, P3 has 3 (includes zkSync, Linea)
recommendation: Update CLAUDE.md and monitoring doc partition-to-chain mappings to match actual configuration.
